Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf. To Provide Further Responses To Deft.'S Request For Production Of Documetns And For Sanction
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Meagan McKinley-Ball, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Harley Marine Services, Inc.
Courtney M. Crawford, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: American Marine Corporation

RULING: HEARING HELD: THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Harley Marine Services, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond Further To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions is GRANTED. American Marine Corporation to serve responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff appeared and acknowledged receipt of the motion. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
